transcript.clean_text: there was a lot of love for the Tour de France in Dax at the start of stage four I write you can watch each and every day on gcn Plus cheered to the start igard legend of the race with his 22 stage victories the guest of honor Adam Yates was still leading in the yellow Jersey Nielsen Palace the king of the mountains today pogacho the best young Rider and the green jersey on the back of a Frenchman Victor laffy with a Peloton traveling 181.8 kilometers between Dax and noga finishing at the famous motor circuit just one classified climb that cut the demu meaning one point and not too much of a carrot to go in the Breakaway a Sprint had been expected at the end of the day and with that Panorama out in front of the 174 Riders left in the tour there were no attacks at the start in fact there were no attacks for a long time when it came to the intermediate Sprint at Notre Dame this is what happened yes but Philips are getting there first taking the maximum 20 points that moved him in the green jersey and then we had our first real Attack and it be the duo normal an old famous race in Normandy and two famous Norman Riders out there taking the king of the mountains Point alongside their Adventure would end with 25 kilometers to go and it looked as though we were set for a Sprint finish nerves were building though everybody together the Pace High and on our way into a motor circuit some taking the wrong turn Sam wellsford going the long way around that round about losing his options of taking the victory once through the all safe three kilometers to go Banner everybody was through the final pinch point crashes though everywhere Fabo jakobs are going down with Jacobi two fast men out the game already won one stage at this tour and they were trying to lead up Brian cooker again as the crashes continue behind but Macho Father Paul brought his man up through the middle Jasper Phillips are going for it again challenged by the likes of Ewan cavadish more crashes behind and it was going to be a close one to the Finish Cavendish with a chance to make it 35 but it was philipsa who made it two out of two Jasper the master from the champs-elysees last year to a Sprint on the first attempt at stage three backing it up on stage four with riders all over the road behind him just beating you and half a wheel the distance in the end another victory for alpacinda kernick and Jasper philipsa the strongest Sprinter in 2023 a good team effort yet again congratulations all around thankfully despite the War Room to thumbs up from Fabio jakobson Alexander another Rider to go down going down with him there soon the top 10 on the day led by Philips ahead of you and bar house cooker and Cavendish from popo Christoph mesquit's Fine Art and Peterson all in the best 10 Riders Adam Yates kept the yellow Jersey his lead on change and with those crashes in the final three kilometers everybody given the same time pogacha second his teammate at six seconds Yates his brother from Jayco alula in third at the same time 22 seconds between first and 10th something new though in the green jersey classification as Jasper Phillips took over from Victor olafair and look at that healthy lead at the top 150 points plays 80. philipsa the early Contender for the green jersey but the sprinters are about Paul to lahas a big day 162.7 kilometers with our first big climbs our first brush with the Pyrenees with bonus seconds at the top before it is sent into lahras the Tour de France continues to hot up the war wounds will be licked before our first brush with the Pyrenees you can watch it live and On Demand each and every day on gcn Plus
